texto: The linguistic system represented in the mind-brain gives some account of everything submitted to it: good sentences, bad sentences, sentences in other languages, ums and ahs, coughs; perhaps -Chomsky suggests- even to non-linguistic events like a squeaking door.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Neilson Voyne Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a inteligencia. O trecho “The linguistic system represented in the mind-brain gives some account of everything submitted to…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, language, linguistics pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e linguistics.
